description: A weakness has been identified in code-projects Simple Banking System 1.0. Impacted is an unknown function of the file /removeuser.php. Executing manipulation of the argument ID can lead to sql injection. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be exploited.
